name: Airport Transfer — Bahir Dar
description: Comfortable private vehicle transfer between Gashuna Hotel and Bahir Dar Belay Zeleke International Airport. Our experienced drivers will ensure a safe and comfortable journey through the beautiful Gojjam highland roads.

name: City Transfer — Dangla
description: Private vehicle transfer within Dangla city and surrounding areas. Perfect for business meetings, shopping trips, or exploring the local area.

name: Blue Nile Gorge Day Tour
description: A full-day guided tour to one of Ethiopia's most spectacular natural wonders — the Blue Nile Gorge, approximately 2 hours from Dangla. Experience breathtaking views of the dramatic canyon and the mighty Blue Nile River. Includes transportation, guide, and picnic lunch.

name: Lake Tana and Tis Abay Tour
nameAmharic: ጣና ሐይቅ እና ጢስ አባይ ጉዞ
description: A full-day tour to Lake Tana (the source of the Blue Nile) and the magnificent Tis Abay (Blue Nile Falls), approximately 3 hours from Dangla. Visit ancient island monasteries on Lake Tana and witness the spectacular waterfall. Includes transportation and certified guide.

name: Bahir Dar City Tour
description: A guided day tour of Bahir Dar, capital of the Amhara Region. Visit the beautiful Lake Tana shores, local markets, Blue Nile Falls, and ancient churches. Includes transportation from Dangla and back.

name: Chara Forest Walk
description: A guided nature walk through the beautiful Chara indigenous forest near Dangla. Discover endemic birds, unique highland flora, and the peaceful natural environment of the Awi Zone. Half-day tour.

name: Laundry Service — Wash and Iron
description: Full laundry service including washing, drying, and ironing of your clothes. Same-day service available if items are submitted before 10:00 AM. Handled with care by our professional laundry team.

name: Dry Cleaning
description: Professional dry cleaning service for delicate garments, suits, traditional Ethiopian clothing (habesha kemis, gabi), and formal wear. 24-48 hour turnaround.

name: Traditional Ethiopian Massage
description: A relaxing traditional Ethiopian massage using locally sourced oils and ancient techniques passed down through generations. Choose from 60-minute or 90-minute sessions.

name: Conference Hall — Full Day
description: Gashuna Hotel's fully equipped conference hall accommodating up to 120 guests. Features projector, sound system, whiteboard, air conditioning, and catering service. Perfect for corporate meetings, seminars, government functions, and community events.

name: Conference Hall — Half Day
description: Half-day rental of our conference hall (up to 4 hours). Includes projector, sound system, and coffee break service.

name: Meeting Room
description: Smaller meeting room for private business meetings, interviews, or small group sessions. Accommodates up to 15 people. Includes whiteboard and TV screen.

name: Swimming Pool Access
description: Access to Gashuna Hotel's swimming pool. Towels and lounge chairs provided. Non-resident day pass available for guests not staying at the hotel.

name: Business Center
description: Full business center with high-speed internet computers, printing, scanning, photocopying, and fax services. Located at the front desk area.

name: Printing and Scanning
description: Professional printing and scanning services available at the front desk. Black and white or color printing available.

name: Currency Exchange
description: Currency exchange service at competitive rates. We accept major international currencies including USD, EUR, and GBP. Exchange to Ethiopian Birr (ETB) for your stay.

name: Free WiFi
description: High-speed WiFi internet access available throughout Gashuna Hotel — in all rooms, the restaurant, lobby, and conference areas. No charge for hotel guests.

name: Traditional Ethiopian Coffee Ceremony
description: A private traditional Ethiopian coffee ceremony experience for your group. Our skilled staff will perform the full ceremony — roasting, grinding, and brewing fresh Ethiopian coffee in a clay jebena, served with popcorn and incense in the traditional way. Perfect for cultural immersion.
